title: [MTR]413series
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/hcj1_SMdF_Q" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>This is an add-on for the MTR mod!
Adds the 413 series Japanese train.

MTR is required.

To place the train:
・Place the garage rails
・Use the Railway Dashboard
・Specify the garage area
・Approach it and press ctr+click to select the train.
![413series](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f957b629afb35d0a283aa78bb85152c0dd6dbe3a_0.webp)
